metadata.note: Optimizer outputs are model-predicted candidates only. They are not physical robot validation results.

original_label_target_error_mm.meaning: 3D distance between original measured Vive label p_vive_x/y/z and target p_target_x/y/z in the input dataset.

best_predicted_error_mm.meaning: 3D distance between optimizer-selected model prediction pred_x/y/z and target p_target_x/y/z. This is synthetic/model-only and not a physical measured error.
